const CARDS_DATA = [
    {
        id: 1,
        title: 'Card 1',
        description: 'This is the first card.',
        imageSrc: 'https://shop.timecenter.jo/cdn/shop/products/SYXB101_sa200_nvz_6_2e56502e-da1b-4bec-88d7-7d756f1875c7.jpg?v=1751577831&width=1024',
        imageAlt: 'Placeholder Image 1',
        actions: <button>Action 1</button>
    },
    {
        id: 2,
        title: 'Card 2',
        description: 'This is the second card.',
        imageSrc: 'https://shop.timecenter.jo/cdn/shop/products/SYXB101_sa200_nvz_6_2e56502e-da1b-4bec-88d7-7d756f1875c7.jpg?v=1751577831&width=1024',  
        imageAlt: 'Placeholder Image 2',    
        actions: <button>Action 2</button>
    },
    {
        id: 3,
        title: 'Card 3',
        description: 'This is the third card.',
        imageSrc: 'https://shop.timecenter.jo/cdn/shop/products/SYXB101_sa200_nvz_6_2e56502e-da1b-4bec-88d7-7d756f1875c7.jpg?v=1751577831&width=1024',
        imageAlt: 'Placeholder Image 3',    
        actions: <button>Action 3</button>
    }
]
export default CARDS_DATA;
